//: Project-specific lint config for lint-docs.js. Copy to tools/lint-docs.config.json and customise per project. Universal rules (forbidden historical-language phrases) are baked into lint-docs.js — this file adds project-specific rules.

forbidden_phrases.//: Banned terminology — product framing rules unique to your project.
forbidden_phrases.msg: banned terminology 'free trial' (see your project's universal product rules ADR)

forbidden_phrases.//: Deprecated category / character / item names (after a rename).
Old file slug after rename. Set allowInBreadcrumb: true if breadcrumbs about the rename should NOT trigger.
